hero.title: API Diagnostics
hero.lede: A detached workbench for observing AionUi runtime activity and inspecting conversation stop cleanup, worker retention, and memory growth in the local HTTP API.

panel.samplingDesc: Automatic sampling only affects the current app run and does not change users' saved API settings.
panel.autoSamplingHelp: Control whether the app continuously records API diagnostics samples. Manual capture remains available at any time.
panel.manualDesc: Target a single session or leave it empty for a global process snapshot. Manual capture still works when automatic sampling is off.
panel.sessionIdPlaceholder: Leave empty for a global snapshot
panel.activityDesc: Shows sessions in AionUi that are currently running, processing, or waiting for confirmation so you can inspect the whole app state.
panel.trendDesc: Shows the latest captures from this app run, including automatic route sampling and manual captures.

trend.empty: No recent trend data yet. Turn on automatic sampling or capture a snapshot to populate the charts.
trend.rssSubtitle: Resident set size across recent samples.
trend.heapSubtitle: JS heap changes across the latest captures.
trend.tasksSubtitle: Useful for spotting task retention after stop.
trend.cacheSubtitle: Message cache size combined with active turn residue.

timeline.empty: No captures recorded during this app run.

activity.empty: There are no globally active sessions right now. Turn on automatic sampling or click refresh to continue monitoring AionUi.

status.ready: Diagnostics page is ready. Automatic sampling is {state}.
status.configApplied: Diagnostics config was applied to this app run.
status.snapshotCapturedPersisted: Diagnostics snapshot captured and written to disk.
status.noOutputPath: No diagnostics output path is available yet.
status.outputOpened: Opened diagnostics output in the host file manager.
